title: Mago's Minecraft Hell Edition
description: A nice modpack for the everyone!
body:
![Title - bro I loved it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f56d4eed7d2fcad03cc1da498757c0854cad1b06.png)

Mago's Hell Edition turn your **Simple** and **Relaxing** Minecraft Experience, in a circus of infinity **Death** and **Suffering** :>

---

**IMPORTANT!**

I don't really think this is _possible to play normally_, so you can make it easier configuring the **mobstrenght-common.toml**.

---

Install **Mob Battle** to a fun mob battle in creative mode:
[Download link :>](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mob-battle-mod)

---
